approval.approval_note: User approved the P6 in-app alerts work-unit digest after the P5.1 trial-capture verification passed.
approval.approved_digest_note: Digest of the exact draft content (status draft_not_runnable) at approval time, computed with the p5_work_unit_digest canonicalization (JSON, sort_keys, compact separators). This file's status flip to approved_pending_implementation and this approval block are the only post-approval changes.

goal: Implement in-app alerts per the approved P6 contract: local-engine evaluation of price/indicator threshold alerts against admitted data, session-local persistence, and research-only in-app presentation. No external delivery channel.
implementation_slices: alert definition schema validation (tqe-in-app-alert/v1) with fail-closed rejection
local-engine deterministic evaluator over admitted fixture/read-model data (price_threshold, indicator_threshold)
dedup and expiry semantics (once_per_session, cooldown_seconds, session, until)
session-local persistence of alert definitions (flat versioned JSON, watchlist style)
in-app presentation surface (research-only alerts panel, no order-like affordance)
deterministic fixture tests with delivery stubbed to in-app events only
acceptance evidence JSON recording channel scope
activation_requirements: human approval of this exact work-unit digest
p4_research_closure.py passing before and after implementation
offline replay of deterministic fixture tests
acceptance JSON with channels recorded as in_app only
cannot_claim: external delivery channel implemented or approved
order route, order command, or order UI control
alert definitions or history leaving the local machine
